title: Original Art
description: Paintings replaced with their original versions in 128x resolution
body:
Did you know that minecraft paintings are real paintings?

They just pixelated. This pack fixes it by replacing paintings with same but in 128x resolution.



Or maybe try my other packs:

[Connected World](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-world-16x)

[Giantcraft Reborn](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/giantcraft-reborn)

[Uncrafted](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/uncrafted-resourcepack)





 

Original paintings done by Kristoffer Zetterstrand. I do not claim any rights. All credit to author of original art.

You can have a look at full res pictures here https://imgur.com/gallery/R7qao



Anybody is free to use this pack anywhere. Just do not rename the pack, please.



If you have any questions or you want to support what I do:



My [YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrMHx89X71br0aDlzwsLDHQ)

My [Twitch channel](https://www.twitch.tv/dedmaxim99)
